data.title: Avalanche Announces Major Leap Into Regulated Finance With New EU Securities Platform
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Securitize has received EU approval to launch its new Trading and Settlement System across all 27 member states.

data.title: A major whale has withdrawn another 49,000 SOL tokens for staking, bringing its total staked amount to $1.18 billion.
data.description: According to OnchainLens monitoring, a whale recently withdrew 49,165 SOL tokens (approximately $7 million) from OKX and transferred them all to staking. Since August 22, 2025, this address has staked a total of 761,405 SOL tokens (worth approximately $117.97 million at the time of staking). Based on the current market price, this batch of SOL is worth approximately $109.48 million, resulting in a paper loss of approximately $8.45 million.

data.title: Swiss Banks Achieve Real-Time Settlement with Distributed Ledger Technology
data.description:
According to PANews, Swiss compliant crypto bank Amina Bank and Deutsche Börse's Crypto Finance Group have successfully completed a real-time fiat currency settlement pilot on Google's Universal Ledger. This initiative enables 24/7 instant settlements while maintaining full compliance throughout the process. The pilot demonstrated the modernization potential of distributed ledger technology (DLT) in scenarios such as cross-border payments, multi-currency settlements, and POS systems, with all participating banks adhering to existing regulatory frameworks.

Amina Bank's CEO highlighted that the pilot proves that technological innovation can coexist with financial stability, offering a practical model for transforming the global financial system. As the currency operator for the pilot, Crypto Finance Group was responsible for setting transaction rules and overseeing compliance processes. A Google Cloud executive noted that this infrastructure can be integrated into banks' core systems to provide near real-time payment services to customers. The next phase of the pilot will expand into consumer POS integration and cross-border payment sectors.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list GaiAi (GAIX) on November 29th.
data.description: Binance Alpha has announced that GaiAi (GAIX) will be listed on November 29th. After trading begins, eligible users can visit the Alpha event page and use their Binance Alpha Points to claim the GAIX airdrop. More details will be announced later; users can follow Binance's official channels for the latest information.

data.title: Switzerland Tax Data Sharing On Crypto Will Not Begin Until 2027
data.description:
Switzerland will delay sharing crypto tax data with foreign authorities until at least 2027, even as the legal framework takes effect in 2026.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/switzerland-crypto-tax-data-sharing-kicks-in-2027/

data.title: Visa Collaborates with AquaNow for Faster Settlements Using Stablecoins
data.description: According to PANews, Visa (V.N) has partnered with AquaNow to enhance settlement speed by utilizing stablecoins. This collaboration aims to streamline financial transactions, offering a more efficient settlement process.

data.title: After three years of inactivity, a whale sold 200 BTC, making a total profit of over $25 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, address 1CA98y has become active again after nearly three years, having just sold 200 BTC, cashing out approximately $18.35 million. This address initially withdrew 400 BTC from OKX on April 1, 2023 (worth $11.37 million at the time, at a price of approximately $28,432). Based on the current sale, the address's cumulative profit has exceeded $25 million (+223%).

data.title: QCP: Bitcoin is stable in the short term but pressure is accumulating; 80-82k is a key support level.
data.description: In its latest market memo, QCP Asia stated that Bitcoin is currently holding steady in the high $80,000 range, driven by improved risk sentiment and an upward revision of the probability of a December rate cut to 85%. However, macroeconomic signals remain mixed: inflation remains high, employment data is weak, and key data releases such as initial jobless claims and ADP are still due this week. QCP pointed out that AI-related credit indicators are weakening, CDS is expanding, and market concerns about Nvidia's rising accounts receivable and inventory levels are intensifying; crypto fund flows are also bearish, with ETFs experiencing continued net outflows, and most products trading below 1 mNAV. Strategy has once again attracted market attention due to its Bitcoin holdings approaching cost price and its stock being placed on MSCI's watch list. Looking ahead to the end of the year, BTC positions show a structure of "heavy hedging on the downside and limited buying on the upside": significant pressure is seen around $90,000, while the $80-$82k range is a key support level. QCP asked whether the current temporary stability can be sustained, or whether a new market trend is brewing.

data.title: The Changsha Yuhua District Procuratorate disclosed a case involving the "scamming of foreign investors" related to virtual currency, in which all 11 defendants were convicted.
data.description: The Yuhua District Procuratorate in Changsha disclosed a case involving a "foreign investment scam" using virtual currency, in which all 11 defendants were convicted. The case revealed that in March 2024, Liu and Li set up a well-organized online fraud den in a small apartment in Yuhua District, posing as "financially savvy women" to lure foreign men to invest in virtual currencies on fake websites. The gang created the illusion of profit by making small withdrawals, then shut down the withdrawal function to "harvest" the funds, with the total amount involved reaching approximately 340,000 yuan. (Changsha Evening News)

data.title: BIS Highlights Risks in Tokenized Money Market Funds
data.description:
According to PANews, a recent report by the Bank for International Settlements (BIS) reveals that the total assets of tokenized money market funds have surged from $770 million at the end of 2023 to nearly $9 billion. These funds have become a crucial source of collateral within the crypto ecosystem. However, the BIS warns that while these assets offer the flexibility of stablecoins, they also pose significant operational and liquidity risks.

The BIS identifies liquidity mismatch as the primary risk associated with tokenized money market funds. It notes that although investors can redeem tokenized fund shares daily, the underlying assets still adhere to the traditional T+1 settlement mechanism. During periods of market stress, concentrated redemption demands could expose this structural vulnerability.

The organization further points out that the market is still in its early stages of development, with solutions continuously evolving. For instance, financial technology company Broadridge has introduced a Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) system, which enables same-day settlement of tokenized treasury transfers.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum claim threshold for the GUA airdrop is 256 points, and claiming it will consume 15 points.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha will list SUPERFORTUNE (GUA) on November 27, 2025 at 16:00 (UTC+8). After trading begins, users holding at least 256 Binance Alpha Points can claim a 750 GUA airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis. If the event is still ongoing, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes. Note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, it will be considered a forfeit.

data.title: Solana Attempts Recovery as Price Reclaims $143 Support Zone
data.description:
Solana is trying to stabilize after several difficult weeks, with the price now trading around $143. 48 following a sharp rebound from the $130 area. The latest TradingView chart shows SOL pushing back above a crucial high-timeframe demand zone, offering the first constructive price action since the recent market-wide downturn
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solana-attempts-recovery-as-price-reclaims-143-support-zone/

data.title: South Korea’s Upbit wallets hacked, $36 million in Solana-based assets lost
data.description:
South Korea’s biggest cryptocurrency exchange, Upbit, suffered a security breach early Thursday, according to its operator, Dunamu Inc. , which confirmed over $30 million worth of Solana-based assets were siphoned from company wallets. In a statement written early Thursday, Dunamu CEO Oh Kyung-seok said the platform had detected unauthorized withdrawals before dawn. “A portion of Solana-affiliated […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korea-upbit-wallets-hacked/

data.title: South Korea’s Upbit Reports $36 Million Loss in Solana Hot-Wallet Breach
data.description:
South Korea’s largest crypto exchange halted services and shifted assets to cold storage after detecting unauthorized withdrawals.
source: https://decrypt.co/350196/south-koreas-upbit-36-million-loss-solana-hot-wallet-breach

data.title: Binance Alpha has completed the TOWN token swap and opened deposits and trading of the new tokens.
data.description: Binance Alpha 2.0 announced the completion of the Alt.town (TOWN) contract swap, with the old and new tokens being replaced at a 1:1 ratio. Deposits of the new TOWN tokens are now open. Furthermore, TOWN officially began trading on Binance Alpha 2.0 on November 27, 2025 at 14:00 (UTC+8).
